title: Geophysical Signatures and Active Tectonics at the South-Central Chilean Margin
journal: The Andes: Frontiers in Earth Sciences (Springer)
abstract: The ISSA 2000 and SPOC 2001 onshore and offshore projects surveyed the Chilean margin between 36° and 40°S, including the location of the 1960 Valdivia earthquake. The chapter discusses geophysical and active-source seismic data acquired offshore and onshore in the south-central Chilean margin, including reflection and refraction profiles from RV Sonne cruise SO161.

location.description: South-central Chilean margin 36°–40°S; SPOC (SO161) amphibious survey and ISSA 2000 land survey

seismic_lines.name: SPOC SO161 MCS and OBH profiles — 36°–40°S

acquisition.vessel: R/V SONNE (SO161, SPOC 2001) and land stations (ISSA 2000)

data.name: SPOC SO161 MCS Reflection Profiles — South-Central Chile 36°–40°S
data.description: Multichannel seismic reflection profiles from SPOC SO161 across the south-central Chilean margin (36°–40°S) at the 1960 Valdivia earthquake zone. [SPOC cruise (SO161, 2001) datasets searchable on PANGAEA]

data.name: SPOC SO161 OBH/OBS Wide-Angle Data — South-Central Chile
data.description: Wide-angle OBH and OBS refraction data from SPOC SO161 providing velocity models for the south-central Chile margin. [SPOC cruise (SO161, 2001) datasets searchable on PANGAEA]

data.name: SPOC SO161 Swath Bathymetry — South-Central Chile
data.description: Multibeam bathymetry from SO161 SPOC cruise in the south-central Chilean margin region. [SPOC cruise (SO161, 2001) datasets searchable on PANGAEA]

_data_note: SPOC (SO161) data accessible via MGDS. ISSA 2000 land data not in marine repositories.

processing.summary: Review chapter presenting geophysical data synthesis from the SPOC 2001 (SO161) offshore survey and ISSA 2000 onshore survey for the south-central Chilean margin (36°–40°S). Includes MCS reflection and OBH/OBS refraction profiles from the SPOC cruise combined with land-based explosion seismology and seismicity data. Covers the 1960 Valdivia earthquake rupture zone.
workflow: 1. Data compilation from SPOC and ISSA projects
processing.notes: Springer review chapter; SPOC SO161 data accessible via MGDS

analysis_notes: Springer book chapter; behind paywall. SPOC SO161 data at MGDS. ISSA 2000 land data not in public marine repositories.
